examples: The jeweller has a workroom at the back of his shop.
The jeweller was stabbed as he tried to fight the robbers off.
The Roman jeweller was founded by Sotirio Boulgaris, a Greek immigrant to Italy, in 1884.
Despite his name, Cartier was no jeweller: he had found worthless quartz crystals and fool's gold.
The jeweller house regularly loans its jewels to celebrities, including Paris Hilton and Cameron Diaz.
